title: Looking for material on visual clues
display_title: Looking for material on visual clues
wikitext:
[]: Looking for material on visual clues             Quote Post by unz » Sat Oct 24, 2015 5:06 pm Apparently my google fu sucks and I can't find the right wiki page. I was wondering about the eyes as visual clues but also things like the anti at fields technology behind bullets and smaller evas both reminiscing of spears. Also wtf was that light messing with Asuka at the beginning of Q, maybe I missed something. I always took the eye shots as revealing, both in nge and nte, so you have things like pierced eva faces spurting blood or...a whole bunch of eye shots through the whole Q. Which features loads of eyes on all evas with single pilots, plus female characters tend to mess with their left eye and so does Shinji in unit13 since this time it's kaworu taking the lead for a bit. So yeah we have rules for giveaways and (ugh) power status (green mari, green blue Asuka, red kaworu/Shinji/Rei) but when it comes to empty eye sockets and eva faces I know I'm missing stuff. Actually gendo is the fun one with this "my poker face is stronger than yours everyone"

[]:             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Wed Oct 28, 2015 1:44 pm What do you mean by visual clues? Like things that can link Rebuild and NGE?

[]:             Quote Post by Arcadia's legacy » Wed Oct 28, 2015 1:48 pm I think he means what certain visual motifs (e.g. the recurring use of eyes) actually mean in the context of NTE

[]:             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Wed Oct 28, 2015 3:29 pm ^ Okay that makes more sense cause someone already put all those photos together, granted I thought they were lame. If that 4 = Death thing is true, 02 and 08 have 4's, double 4's in 08 case.

[]:             Quote Post by unz » Wed Oct 28, 2015 3:34 pm Kind of proof-read, also what arcadia legacy said. I thought the 01 pierced eye was a way to imply things were not like they seemed, like this is not a robot, and a parallel to Rei's bleeding. I just don't know what's the deal with left eyes and why Shinji screams every time an eva or a giant Rei stares at him, I get he has issues with "the other" and that there's this fear of the repressed coming back but I don't get the thinking behind the eyes. Probably the mirror theme but how does this trigger Shinji's reactions?

Article: Looking for material on visual clues
 proof-read, also what arcadia legacy said. I thought the 01 pierced eye was a way to imply things were not like they seemed, like this is not a robot, and a parallel to Rei's bleeding. I just don't know what's the deal with left eyes and why Shinji screams every time an eva or a giant Rei stares at him, I get he has issues with "the other" and that there's this fear of the repressed coming back but I don't get the thinking behind the eyes. Probably the mirror theme but how does this trigger Shinji's reactions?
